hero.subtitle: Free and independent multi-sourcing service. We activate the entire market and present you with 4–9 relevant candidates with rates — completely non-binding.

howItWorks.title: From need to contract —
howItWorks.sub: FindITconsultants coordinates the process between you, our supplier network and the consultants — you choose freely and sign the agreement directly.
howItWorks.phase01Customer: Fill in the form with competencies, timeline, work mode and budget. Under 3 minutes.
howItWorks.phase02Findit: Approves the request and immediately notifies 70+ suppliers and freelance networks.
howItWorks.phase02Supplier: Receives notification with task description and competency requirements.
howItWorks.phase03Findit: Screens and approves submitted profiles. Irrelevant proposals are filtered out.
howItWorks.phase03Supplier: Submits relevant consultant profiles with price, CV and availability.
howItWorks.phase04Customer: Receives 4–9 screened profiles in the customer portal and requests interviews.
howItWorks.phase04Findit: Presents approved profiles and coordinates interview times.
howItWorks.phase04Supplier: Confirms interview time via the supplier portal.
howItWorks.phase05Customer: Signs the contract directly with the chosen supplier. No middlemen, no fee.
howItWorks.phase05Supplier: Signs contract directly with the customer. FindITconsultants is not party to the agreement.
howItWorks.noBinding: No commitment · No fee from the customer

whyUs.title: Independent, non-binding
whyUs.sub: We are not a consultancy — we are your independent IT multi-sourcing partner all the way.
whyUs.item0Desc: We search among 70+ consultancies and freelance networks in Denmark and nearshore — you get the widest field of candidates.
whyUs.item1Desc: We handle all contact with suppliers and review proposals for you. You receive a clear overview within 3 working days.
whyUs.item2Desc: Market competition works for you. You compare prices across all suppliers and choose with confidence.
whyUs.item3Desc: The agreement is made directly with the supplier. We are not middlemen and never charge a fee from the customer.

faq.title: Everything you need to
faq.sub: Have a question not answered below? Call us at +45 2834 0907.

items.q: Is it really free for customers?
items.a: Yes — 100% free, always. We are funded by suppliers who pay a subscription for access to the platform. You sign the contract directly with the chosen supplier, and we never take commission or hidden fees from the customer.

items.q: What happens when I submit a request?
items.a: Within minutes we contact relevant suppliers from our network of 70+. We screen all responses and present you with 4–9 qualified candidates with profiles and hourly rates — typically within 3 working days.

items.q: Who are the suppliers in your network?
items.a: Our network consists of approved Danish consultancies, consultant agencies and freelance networks — including both nearshore and offshore partners. All suppliers are verified and have accepted our quality requirements.
Yes. We only share relevant parts of your request with selected suppliers, and no third parties outside the process have access to your data. We fully comply with GDPR.

items.q: Do I commit to anything by submitting a request?
items.a: Not at all. You choose whether to proceed with any of the presented candidates. No commitment, no contract with us — the agreement is made directly with the supplier.

items.q: What if no candidates are suitable?
items.a: We repeat the search or adjust the criteria. Our goal is to find the right match — not just to send profiles. Contact us and we'll find a solution.
